arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Stefan Bajcetic Las Palmas, Tariq Lamptey to Ajax, Harvey Vale to QPR,
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Stefan Bajcetic to Las Palmas, Tariq Lamptey to Ajax and Harvey Vale to QPR.

arts.ttl: Liverpool in talks to snatch signing from Manchester United’s clutches despite claims elsewhere
arts.sum: Liverpool are in talks to sign Geovany Quenda from Sporting Club de Portugal and potentially snatch him from Manchester United’s clutches. That’s according to Record, who say Liverpool are in the mix for the highly rated youngster after reports yesterday that Manchester United had already wrapped up a deal for him. arts.ttl: Tottenham linchpin admits Liverpool boss Arne Slot failed with transfer approach
arts.sum: Tottenham star Micky van de Ven has proved an inspired signing but in the past has very much been on Arne Slot's radar with the Liverpool boss failing twice with bids

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sticks to his word with Liverpool January transfer decision made
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot addressed the future of James McConnell and his January transfer plans after the young midfielder's standout performance against PSV Eindhoven

arts.ttl: ‘I was forced to go’: £35m player says he never actually wanted to sign for Liverpool

arts.ttl: Jordan Henderson U-turns on transfer decision as ex-Liverpool captain at centre of Ajax controversy
arts.sum: Former Liverpool captain Jordan Henderson had looked set to leave Ajax earlier this week

arts.ttl: Arne Slot: Bournemouth success down to Liverpool transfer chief
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot lauds the work done at Bournemouth by Richard Hughes before he left the south coast club for Merseyside in the summer.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's first Liverpool comments ring true after January transfer U-turn
arts.sum: Arne Slot says he will be giving English midfielder James McConnell more first-team minutes this season, confirming his feelings about youth players being impressive enough for the Liverpool squad

arts.ttl: How to watch Bournemouth vs Liverpool - TV channel, live stream details, kick off time
arts.sum: Liverpool news as Arne Slot's side enter a crucial week in the Premier League with one of the toughest remaining fixtures away to Bournemouth and you can watch the action outside of the UK

arts.ttl: Trouble brewing for Arne Slot as £85m-rated ace unhappy with transfer stance
arts.sum: Arne Slot has enjoyed a superb debut season with Liverpool, however, it could be about to unravel as one high profile ace is unhappy with his transfer stance. Mo Salah is set to move to Saudi Arabia whilst Liverpool will also sell Harvey Elliott to raise funds.
